title: How can we integrate monday.com with ChatGPT
excerpt: Need to integrate monday.com with CHATGPT, I need to search Board Description into CHATGPT and response needs to be saved in column. How this can be done in monday.com

posts.author: ritesh.agarwal (Ritesh Agarwal)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to integrate monday.com with CHATGPT, I need to search Board Description into CHATGPT and response needs to be saved in column. How this can be done in monday.com

posts.author: lwatkins31 (Lee Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ritesh, I would suggest either using the native AI function in monday.com (here’s the YouTube video about monday AI) or using a tool like Make.com. My company, Omnitas, has posted a webinar on using Make.com to utilise ChatGPT’s functions for social media, which I think will include some of the ways you want to use it: Webinar: AI and monday.com - Streamline your SoMe Efforts with the help of Make.

Hope that helps!

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Ritesh Agarwal

Using the native AI formula builder in monday.com is far more efficient than integrating ChatGPT with your account. With AI formula builder, you can automate the process of converting board descriptions into appropriate responses. The builder also comes with storage support, thereby simplifying the process of response recording.

There is no one-size-fits-all integration connector available for monday.com and ChatGPT. Hence, opting for monday.com’s AI builder is the ideal choice. Being a reputable monday.com consulting services provider, we offer support for a range of our clients to become familiar with the AI formula builder.

Connect with us to know more about this functionality!
